title: Small Hole Puncher, Single Hole Punch for Crafts with Soft Grip Handle, Paper Punch with Paper Cage for Kids, Metal Hole Puncher for Clean Hole for Tags, DIY Crafts in Office, Home, Classroom
features: [Single Hole Punch]: The small hole punch has a 6mm(1/4 inch) punching hole diameter. One cut one hole. You can control the hole distance between each, and punch holes anywhere in your paper, tag or crafts as you like. The 6mm standard hole size can meet most of your needs when doing paper works.

[Sturdy and Durable]: The main body of our hole punch is made of solid metal. With solid construction, the single hole punch for crafts is durable and not easy to break after several times of cutting.

[Soft Silicone Grip]: Unlike pure metal hole punch, our hole puncher for kids has 2 soft silicone grip handles which makes it more comfortable to hold and use the small hole punch. And you hands will not have a sore even if you use this paper hole punch for a long time.

[Easy to Use]: Easy to squeeze. You can easily and quickly punch a clean hole as you like with our holepunch. The one hole punch can punch up to 5 sheets of regular papers at one time, makes paper punch easier and more efficient. Perfect office & school supplies, teacher supplies for small projects

[Paper Mess Holder]: Built with a small waste holder, the hole punches can keep extra paper mess inside the holder until you empty them out. Our paper punches for crafts brings you less mess and more pleasure when doing paper crafts.

[Compact and Portable]: With 14cm length and 76 g weight, the mini hole punch is small and lightweight, easily fit in pockets and backpacks when you need to take the craft punch to school, office or anywhere you want. The single hole puncher is also easy to store and doesn’t take up any room.

[Wide Application]: The ticket punch is not only a great hand tools for paper punching in office, school, homework and crafts, but also can help deal with your Christmas gifting notes and cards, gift wrapping, greeting cards, laminated cards, cardstock, tags, etc. Perfect paper puncher for diy and hand making for binder, files, notebook, scrapbook, invoices, tickets, reward cards, gift tags and clipboards.
description: Product Description MECHEER single hole punch, single hole punch for children, punch card, paper punch for card making, earring hole punch, teacher supplies for school The mini paper punch is very practical for kids on paper crafts in classroom and home, doing DIY crafts like greeting cards, scrapbooks, confetti, invitations, etc. For adults, the paper punches shapes can also be widely used in office and home. Perfect school supplies, teacher supplies and classroom essentials for teachers for punching reward stickers & student incentives. Product features of the 1 hole punch: 1. Single hole for easy use. 2. High quality metal body makes the mini hole puncher for paper sturdy and durable. 3. Soft silicone grip makes it more comfortable to hold and use the hole punch for kids. 4. 1/4 inch standard hole diameter, suitable for most paper hole size needs. 5. Punching up to 5 sheets one time, the hole punch for kids can make your paper works more effective. 6. Paper waste holder can prevent the paper mess from falling everywhere, save your clean up time. 7. Easy to use and make clean cuts. 8. The hole punch single is suitable for both kids and adults, and could be widely used in home, school and office.
